title: PP Compat Pack
description: A Compatibility Pack for Pixel Perfection.
body:
This **compatibility pack** brings support for a variety of minor mods to **Pixel Perfection** texture pack. This project is compatible with both [Pixel Perfection Legacy](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pixel-perfection-legacy) and [Pixel Perfection Fidelity](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pixel-perfection-fidelity). Try my new Texture pack **Pixel Perfection Fidelity**

For more (major) compatibility packs, view MY OTHER PACKS section below. Follow project for future updates and support for more mods. If you want to **request a mod**, or if you have any **issues, bugs or feedback**, please reach out on my [discord](https://discord.gg/3YzBEMEj). # _Note: Some of the textures depicted in the gallery belong to my other pack [PPL Alternative GUI](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ppl-alternative-gui). For a better experience, it's recommended to use it along with this pack._ # MODS SUPPORTED: - [Cherished Worlds](https://modrinth.com/mod/cherished-worlds) - [Immersive Aircraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-aircraft) (BETA) - [Small Ships](https://modrinth.com/mod/small-ships) (DEPRECATED) - [Trinkets](https://modrinth.com/mod/trinkets) - [Better Advancements](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-advancements) - [Axiom](https://modrinth.com/mod/axiom) - [Inventory Profiles Next](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-profiles-next) (BETA) - [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) - [Cursors Extended](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-cursor) - [Crafting Slots](https://modrinth.com/mod/crafting-slots) # DEPENDENCIES - (REQUIRED) [Pixel Perfection Legacy](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pixel-perfection-legacy) _or_ [Pixel Perfection Fidelity](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pixel-perfection-fidelity) - [PPL Alternative GUI](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ppl-alternative-gui) (RECOMMENDED) # **MY OTHER PACKS** - [Pixel Perfection Fidelity](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pixel-perfection-fidelity) - [Pixel Perfection x THE TWILIGHT FOREST](https://modrinth.com/project/pixel-perfection-x-the-twilight-forest) - [Pixel Perfection x AD ASTRA](https://modrinth.com/project/pixel-perfection-x-ad-astra) - [Pixel Perfection x FARMER'S DELIGHT](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pixelperfectionxfarmersdelight) - [Pixel Perfection x DEHYDRATION](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pixel-perfection-x-dehydration/version/1.0) - [Pixel Perfection x CONTROLIFY](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pixel-perfection-x-controlify) - [PPL Hodgepodge](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ppl-hodgepodge) - [PPL Alternative GUI](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ppl-alternative-gui) - [PPL Better Grass](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ppl-better-grass) - [PPL Custom Theme for Jade](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ppl-custom-theme-for-jade)
